# Pavan Raheja — pavan.blog

> Product & Growth operator, angel investor, crypto trader, and writer. Based in Dubai, UAE.

## About

Pavan Raheja is a seasoned Product & Growth operator who has driven 3× growth at Mashkor (Kuwait) and 7× growth at PriceLabs. He angel invests in AI and Web3 companies, trades crypto markets systematically, and writes about product, growth, and building in public.

Core mantra: "Learn daily, grow daily, learn fundamentally."

## Key Experience

- Product Lead (Growth) at Mashkor — 3× revenue and user growth in 18 months (Kuwait)
- Growth at PriceLabs — 7× growth, team scaled from 7 to 150+ people
- Built and sold two content websites (SEO / website flipping)
- 8 years digital marketing, 7 years specialized in SEO
- Angel investments: GrowthX, WorldMobile, Worldcoin

## Writing

Articles on product management, growth frameworks, trading, and building in public.
Published at https://pavan.blog/articles

## Digital Clone

An AI-powered digital clone of Pavan is available at https://pavan.blog — trained on his knowledge, voice, and experience. Ask it about product, growth, trading, or anything else.
